overall.description: A truck driving simulation game showing a nighttime journey on a snow-covered highway. The driver navigates through falling snow, passes other vehicles, and travels through a short tunnel or snow shed structure before continuing on the open road.

events.description: a black car overtakes the truck on the left side
approaching and following a large semi-truck in the same lane

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the snowy highway, navigating through light traffic with snow accumulating on the windshield

notable_agents.action: white sedan traveling ahead in the same lane
black car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: illuminated instrument panel with speedometer, gauges, and GPS navigation screen
snowflakes accumulating on the windshield glass, partially obscuring view
metal guardrails running along both sides of the snowy highway
highway asphalt covered with a layer of snow
snow-covered trees visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along an open snowy highway at night, with snow falling and accumulating on the windshield. The dashboard instruments are illuminated, showing speed and navigation. Other vehicles including a white sedan ahead and a black car overtaking on the left share the road. Snow-covered trees line the distant right side of the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel or avalanche snow shed with concrete support pillars

events.description: entering the covered tunnel structure with overhead roof and concrete pillars
exiting the tunnel back to open highway and snowy conditions

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel, overtaking a large semi-truck on the right side

notable_agents.action: large white semi-truck with SA logo being overtaken on the right

entered.detail: concrete and metal roof structure covering the highway
support pillars lining the left side of the tunnel
support pillars lining the right side of the tunnel
overhead artificial lighting fixtures illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a covered tunnel or snow shed structure with concrete pillars and an overhead roof, providing shelter from the snow. Artificial lighting illuminates the interior as the truck overtakes a large white semi-truck on the right. The open sky and falling snow are no longer visible, and the ground surface transitions to clear asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy highway continuing at night

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey on the open highway, snow resumes falling on the windshield after exiting the tunnel

entered.detail: night sky visible again after exiting the tunnel structure
snowflakes resuming accumulation on the windshield upon exiting the shelter

segments.scene_description: After exiting the tunnel, the truck returns to the open highway where snow is falling again and accumulating on the windshield. The night sky is visible once more, and the snow-covered landscape with distant trees resumes on both sides of the road. The truck continues driving steadily on the snow-covered highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a nighttime snowy highway that briefly transitions through a sheltered tunnel before returning to the open winter landscape. It begins with the truck navigating through falling snow and passing other vehicles, with illuminated dashboard instruments visible as snow accumulates on the windshield. As the truck moves forward, the environment shifts abruptly into a covered snow shed, where concrete pillars and artificial lighting replace the night sky and the road surface clears to asphalt while the truck overtakes a large semi-truck. The scene then opens back up as the vehicle exits the structure, returning the camera to the dark, open highway. Finally, the falling snow and distant snow-covered trees resume their presence on both sides of the road as the truck continues its steady drive.
